data.title: 国际服特别直播「Go! Go! Kivotos!」礼物
data.summary: [Special Live Broadcast, Go! Go! Kivotos! Gifts] Sensei. We have prepared special gifts to celebrate
data.body:
[Special Live Broadcast, Go! Go! Kivotos! Gifts]

Sensei. We have prepared special gifts to celebrate 1.5-year anniversary festival revealed in the special Go! Go! Kivotos live stream! Check your mailbox right away!
